title: derive-consumer-tenant — output
description: Output of the derive-consumer-tenant Tool — the deterministically-derived consumer-tenant ULID per ADR-002. The Mint phase uses this value to populate belongs_to_tenant on the Project entity it writes. The recipe applies prospectively to NEW consumer Projects only; the marketplace tenant ULID is grandfathered per ADR-002's Decision section.

tenant_ulid.description: Consumer-tenant ULID in 'dna:tenant:<26-char>' form. 26 chars from the Crockford base32 alphabet (excludes I, L, O, U); first body char in 0..7 per ULID-spec first-char clamp.
